source_method: OpenAI built-in image generation for a topic-specific non-product editorial smart-home scene.
post_processing: No deterministic rendering or image editing was used. Temporary centered 16:9 and 16:10 crops were created only for visual inspection; cover.png is the original built-in image generation output.

visual_review.full_size: PASS — the entry sensor, automatically lit rooms, homeowner, and router outage cue read as a believable residential moment.
visual_review.article_16x10_crop: PASS — the homeowner, sensor, lit rooms, router status light, and restrained dark-green accents remain clear without awkward cropping.
visual_review.card_16x9_crop: PASS — the routine action and internet-outage cue remain legible at library-card size.
visual_review.prohibited_elements: PASS — no embedded headline, fake chart, decorative route line, translucent panel, inset frame, floating UI card, progress bar, generic diagram, repeated fallback motif, logo, or invented branded hardware.
